codeReview.summary: The updated test removes the manual post-migration index creation from `tests/catalog.test.ts`, so the fresh-database assertions now genuinely depend on the shipped migration path. Combined with the direct temporary-database migration inspection in the handoff, this closes the prior masking issue and proves the intended indexes come from the migration itself.

summary: Reviewed commit 9fc7164fb1990fae2e8eedbc4251116cd2688a11, the handoff, transcript skeleton, and shared-state docs. The feature passes: fresh-database regression coverage now fails if the shipped targeted-index migration stops creating the intended indexes.
